intentSynonyms: show me my pipelines in circleci
see all my pipelines in circleci
list pipelines for a project in circleci
description: List recent pipelines for a project. Requires project_slug (e.g., "gh/org/repo"). Supports filtering by branch.

branch.description: Filter pipelines by VCS branch name

mine.description: Only return pipelines triggered by the current user

page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response
